title: Mellow Dense Australian Beef Casserole
description: A comforting Australian dish featuring tender beef in a rich red wine sauce, perfect for a cold winter's night. This low-calorie-friendly casserole is packed with umami flavor and dense texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 150 degrees Celsius.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the onion until softened.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, then set aside.
In the same pan, add the sliced carrots and potato and cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked beef, carrot and potato mixture, red wine, mushroom broth, tomato paste, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Mix well and transfer the mixture to a 20x20cm baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 2 hours.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
